column1: # Wall-clock time of upstream fastp v1.3.3 on WGS datasets at each thread count.
# These data directly evidence B1 and B3 from Section V of the TUS paper:
#   B1 (decompression bottleneck): WGS SE curve is non-monotone — T=16 is
#       SLOWER than T=4 because the single reader thread is starved by competing
#       worker threads (no async decompressor in upstream fastp).
#   B3 (single-threaded output gzip): WGS PE curves flatten or invert above
#       T=8-16 because the serial writer becomes the critical path.
# Empty cells mean no benchmark run exists for that (dataset
